title: Unique Party 55539 - 18" Foil Prism Congratulations Balloon
features: Round Foil Balloon measures 18" (46cm) when fully inflated with helium (ships uninflated)
Use this shimmering foil balloon at a graduation party, retirement party, engagement party, or to honour sporting or exam success
Combine with latex balloons and curling ribbon to create a balloon bouquet or table decoration
Coordinate with other party decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Celebrate in vibrant and sparkling style with this Foil Prism Congratulations Balloon. Featuring colourful stars and stripes with "Congrats" text, this shimmering foil balloon would be an eye-catching addition to a graduation party, retirement party or engagement party. Use it also to honour sporting, driving test or exam success, or to pass on your best wishes following a baby announcement. Tie it indoors to a chair for a quick and easy stand-alone decoration, or outside your house or venue to help guests locate the party. This foil balloon would also look great combined with assorted latex balloons, curling ribbon and a balloon weight as part of a festive balloon bouquet or table centrepiece. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1 x 18" PKG CONGRATS PRISM BLLN See more
